docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-24-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE AVAILABLE EVIDENCE INDICATES THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 24, 2008 AT 10:00 AM SO THAT PLAINTIFF CAN PRESENT PROOF OF OWNERSHIP. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TONY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PUCK, MR
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,809.57 FILED BY MARTINEZ, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT PUCK, MR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUCK, MR
PROOF OF SERVICE PERSONALLY SERVED ON DEFENDANT MR. PUCK FILED. SERVED ON AUG. 15, 2008.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TONY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT PUCK, MR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUCK, MR $208.97 PRINCIPAL, $81.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $290.47, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY TO PLAINTIFF FOR RENTAL CAR EXPENSES INCURRED. ANY CLAIM PERTAINING TO LOSS OR DAMAGE TO THE SUBJECT VEHICLE MUST BE ADVANCED BY MASON MARTINEZ. DEFENDANT MR. PUCK NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
